title: Dynamic Paintings
description: This resource pack adds Animated Paintings! It helps bring life into your worlds and bases.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Cl43yNvyZFA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Bring your walls to life with **Dynamic Paintings**! This pack transforms Minecraft’s static artworks into animated paintings that adds life into your world. It's perfect for bases that have no life in them!**
 
The resource pack is compatible with Minecraft _Java 1.21.8 – 1.21.10_
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


![Original -> Animated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12cd83266755b50560b94dd6bc5d22d1403d3c93.gif)
